Energy.rec: Focus on CoQ10 and Magnesium Malate.

Skin Health.rec: Focus on Vitamin A and E.

symptom_map.Brain Fog: Check Vitamin D and blood sugar.
symptom_map.Anxiety: Look into Magnesium and Vitamin B6.
symptom_map.Bloating: Possible low digestive enzymes. Try ACV.

ingredient_red_flags.High Fructose Corn Syrup: Concentrated sugar linked to metabolic syndrome.
ingredient_red_flags.Aspartame: Artificial sweetener that may affect gut microbiome.
ingredient_red_flags.Red 40: Artificial dye linked to hyperactivity and sensitivity.
ingredient_red_flags.Yellow 5: Artificial color that can cause allergic reactions.
ingredient_red_flags.Yellow 6: Synthetic dye associated with food sensitivity.
ingredient_red_flags.Blue 1: Synthetic color with potential health concerns.
ingredient_red_flags.Blue 2: Artificial dye linked to potential cellular issues.
ingredient_red_flags.Caramel Color: Class III and IV caramels may contain 4-MEI, a carcinogen.
ingredient_red_flags.Titanium Dioxide: Whitening agent with potential DNA safety concerns.
ingredient_red_flags.Monosodium Glutamate: Flavor enhancer that can cause 'Chinese Restaurant Syndrome'.
ingredient_red_flags.Sodium Nitrite: Preservative in meats; converted to nitrosamines.
ingredient_red_flags.Sodium Nitrate: Linked to increased risk of heart disease.
ingredient_red_flags.Potassium Bromate: Banned in many countries; used to strengthen dough.
ingredient_red_flags.Butylated Hydroxyanisole: BHA; a preservative and potential endocrine disruptor.
ingredient_red_flags.Propyl Gallate: Preservative used to prevent fat oxidation.
ingredient_red_flags.Tert-Butylhydroquinone: TBHQ; chemical preservative in processed snacks.
ingredient_red_flags.Carrageenan: Thickener linked to digestive tract inflammation.
ingredient_red_flags.Polysorbate 80: Emulsifier that can disrupt gut barrier health.
ingredient_red_flags.Sorbitan Monostearate: Synthetic emulsifier used in processed baking.
ingredient_red_flags.Brominated Vegetable Oil: Used in sodas; linked to memory loss and skin issues.
ingredient_red_flags.Sodium Benzoate: Can form benzene when combined with vitamin C.
ingredient_red_flags.Potassium Sorbate: Common preservative that can be skin/eye irritating.
ingredient_red_flags.Sulfur Dioxide: Preservative that can trigger asthma in sensitive users.
ingredient_red_flags.Sodium Bisulfite: Used to prevent discoloration in fruit; allergen.
ingredient_red_flags.Soy Lecithin: If unfermented, can be highly processed and GMO-heavy.
ingredient_red_flags.Hydrogenated Oil: Source of trans-fats; bad for heart health.
ingredient_red_flags.Partially Hydrogenated Oil: Strictly avoided due to high trans-fat content.
ingredient_red_flags.Maltodextrin: High glycemic index thickener; spikes blood sugar.
ingredient_red_flags.Dextrose: Simple sugar that causes rapid insulin spikes.
ingredient_red_flags.Sucralose: Zero-calorie sweetener that alters gut bacteria.
ingredient_red_flags.Saccharin: Artificial sweetener linked to bladder sensitivity.
ingredient_red_flags.Agave Nectar: Marketing as healthy, but very high in fructose.
ingredient_red_flags.Brown Rice Syrup: High glycemic index; potential arsenic contamination.
ingredient_red_flags.Ethyl Vanillin: Synthetic flavor made from petroleum byproducts.
ingredient_red_flags.Diacetyl: Artificial butter flavor linked to lung issues.
ingredient_red_flags.Cottonseed Oil: Often contains pesticide residues from cotton farming.
ingredient_red_flags.Casein: Milk protein that can trigger inflammatory responses.
ingredient_red_flags.Hydrolyzed Soy Protein: Processed flavor enhancer similar to MSG.
ingredient_red_flags.Refined Flour: Stripped of nutrients; causes rapid sugar spikes.
ingredient_red_flags.Enriched Flour: Synthetic vitamins added back to stripped grain.
ingredient_red_flags.Guar Gum: Thickener that can cause bloating and gas.
ingredient_red_flags.Xanthan Gum: Stabilizer that can disrupt digestion in large amounts.
ingredient_red_flags.Sodium Caseinate: Highly processed milk protein used as thickener.
ingredient_red_flags.Microcrystalline Cellulose: Wood pulp derivative used as a bulking agent.

sugars.msg: High sugar; watch for insulin spikes.

proteins.msg: Excellent protein source for muscle recovery.

saturated-fat.msg: High saturated fat; potential cardiovascular impact.

fiber.msg: High fiber; excellent for gut health and digestion.

iron.msg: Good source of iron for oxygen transport.

vitamin-b12.msg: Essential for nerve tissue and red blood cells.

phosphorus.msg: Aids in bone and teeth formation.
